rounds.title: Round 1
rounds.sourceText: With grey yarn: Magic loop, ch1, 7sc, slst to the first sc.

operation.instruction: Join with a slip stitch to the first single crochet

rounds.title: Round 2
rounds.sourceText: Ch1, sc inc in the same st, sc inc, change to white yarn: (sc inc)x5. Change back to grey yarn on the final yo of the last sc, and slst to the first sc.

statements.sourceText: sc inc in the same st
Change back to grey yarn on the final yo of the last sc

operation.note: Change back to grey yarn on the final yarn over of the last single crochet

operation.instruction: slip stitch for joining to a different round

rounds.title: Round 3
rounds.sourceText: Ch2 (count as 1hdc), 1hdc in the same st to complete the first hdc inc. Hdc inc, 1hdc; Change to white yarn: Hdc inc, 1hdc, hdc inc, (1sc, sc inc) repeat 2 times, hdc inc, 1hdc, hdc inc; Change back to grey yarn: 1hdc. Slst to the top of the first ch2.

statements.sourceText: 1hdc in the same st to complete the first hdc inc

operation.instruction: in the same st to complete the first hdc inc

statements.sourceText: Slst to the top of the first ch2

operation.instruction: to the top of the first ch2

operation.note: to complete the first hdc inc

statements.sourceText: 1hdc in the same st to complete the first hdc inc
Slst to the top of the first ch2

rounds.sourceText: Ch2 (count as 1hdc), 1hdc in the same st to complete the first hdc inc, (hdc inc)x3; Change to white yarn: 1hdc, 1hdc+1sc, 1sc, sc inc, 9sc, sc inc, 1sc, 1sc+1hdc, 1hdc; Change back to grey yarn: hdc inc. Slst to the top of the first ch2.
rounds.title: Round 4

statements.sourceText: Slst to the top of the first ch2

rounds.sourceText: Ch2 (count as 1hdc), 3hdc, (hdc inc)x3; Change to white yarn: 3hdc, 2sc, (sc inc, 4sc) repeat 2 times, sc inc, 2sc, 3hdc; Change back to grey yarn: (hdc inc)x3. Slst to the top of the first ch2, and fasten off.
rounds.title: Round 5
Squaring
rounds.sourceText: Third loop only. With grey stitches on top, join new yarn to the 4th grey stitch from the right. Ch3 (count as 1dc), 1dc in the same st to complete the first dc inc, 8hdc, dc inc, ch3; [dc inc, 8hdc, dc inc, ch3] repeat 3 times, omit the final ch3. Instead, work ch1, then 1hdc into the top of the first ch3.

statements.sourceText: Third loop only. With grey stitches on top

note.message: Third loop only. With grey stitches on top
note.sourceText: Third loop only. With grey stitches on top

statements.sourceText: join new yarn to the 4th grey stitch from the right
1dc in the same st to complete the first dc inc
[dc inc, 8hdc, dc inc, ch3] repeat 3 times, omit the final ch3

repeat.normalizationNote: Original repeat count was 3, but the final iteration differs. Normalized to a homogeneous repeat of 2 plus the final iteration flattened below.

statements.sourceText: 1hdc into the top of the first ch3

rounds.title: Border
rounds.sourceText: Ch3 (count as 1dc), 1dc in the same corner, 1dc in each st around, (2dc, ch3, 2dc) in each corner as you go. When you return to the starting corner, work (2dc, ch3), slst to the top of the first ch3, fasten off.

statements.sourceText: (2dc, ch3, 2dc) in each corner as you go
When you return to the starting corner, work (2dc, ch3), slst to the top of the first ch3, fasten off.

note.message: When you return to the starting corner, work (2dc, ch3), slst to the top of the first ch3, fasten off.
note.sourceText: When you return to the starting corner, work (2dc, ch3), slst to the top of the first ch3, fasten off.

rounds.title: Inner Ear
rounds.sourceText: With grey stitches on top, join white yarn to the 4th grey stitch from the left. Ch2, (1dc, ch-1 pic, 1dc) in the next st, ch2, slst to the next st. Fasten off and weave in the ends.

statements.sourceText: join white yarn to the 4th grey stitch from the left

operation.instruction: slip stitch for joining to a different round
Join grey yarn to the st immediately to the right of the inner ear join (the 5th grey st from the left)
operation.target: the st immediately to the right of the inner ear join (the 5th grey st from the left)

statements.sourceText: Join grey yarn to the st immediately to the right of the inner ear join (the 5th grey st from the left)

note.message: Now we crochet along the inner ear part and work in the TLO:
note.sourceText: Now we crochet along the inner ear part and work in the TLO:

statements.sourceText: Now we crochet along the inner ear part and work in the TLO:

operation.target: the same grey st used for the inner ear's final slst

statements.sourceText: Slst in the same grey st used for the inner ear's final slst

rounds.sourceText: Join grey yarn to the st immediately to the right of the inner ear join (the 5th grey st from the left), ch1. Now we crochet along the inner ear part and work in the TLO: sk the initial ch, 2sc, sc inc, 2sc, ch1. Slst in the same grey st used for the inner ear's final slst. Fasten off, and weave in your ends.
rounds.title: Ear Edge

note.message: Repeat the ear instructions on the opposite side, leaving a 5-stitch for symmetry. (Join white yarn for the inner ear in the 3rd grey stitch from the right.)
note.sourceText: Repeat the ear instructions on the opposite side, leaving a 5-stitch for symmetry. (Join white yarn for the inner ear in the 3rd grey stitch from the right.)

statements.sourceText: Repeat the ear instructions on the opposite side, leaving a 5-stitch for symmetry. (Join white yarn for the inner ear in the 3rd grey stitch from the right.)

rounds.sourceText: Repeat the ear instructions on the opposite side, leaving a 5-stitch for symmetry. (Join white yarn for the inner ear in the 3rd grey stitch from the right.)
rounds.title: Wolf's Right Ear
Round 1
rounds.sourceText: Magic loop, ch2(count as 1hdc), 9hdc, slst to the top of the first ch2.

operation.instruction: These 2 chains count as 1 half double crochet.

statements.sourceText: slst to the top of the first ch2

operation.instruction: Join to the top of the first ch2.
slip stitch for joining to a different round

operation.note: leave a long tail for attaching

statements.sourceText: Fasten off, leave a long tail for attaching.

rounds.sourceText: Ch1+1sc, 1sc in each st around, slst to the first sc. Fasten off, leave a long tail for attaching.
rounds.title: Round 2
Attach the Muzzle
rounds.sourceText: Turn the muzzle over so the wrong side faces out. Position it on the lower center of the head and sew it firmly in place. You can add a small amount of stuffing before closing.

statements.sourceText: Turn the muzzle over so the wrong side faces out. Position it on the lower center of the head and sew it firmly in place. You can add a small amount of stuffing before closing.

operation.instruction: Turn the muzzle over so the wrong side faces out. Position it on the lower center of the head and sew it firmly in place. You can add a small amount of stuffing before closing.

rounds.sourceText: Stitch the nose on the muzzle.
rounds.title: The Nose

statements.sourceText: Stitch the nose on the muzzle.

operation.note: Stitch the nose on the muzzle.

rounds.title: Eyes & Blushes
rounds.sourceText: Make two French knots for the eyes. Then, use pink yarn to stitch the blushes just below the eyes for a finished look.

statements.sourceText: Make two French knots for the eyes.

operation.instruction: Make two French knots for the eyes.

statements.sourceText: Then, use pink yarn to stitch the blushes just below the eyes for a finished look.

operation.instruction: Use pink yarn to stitch the blushes just below the eyes for a finished look.
